name: button-outline
visual_summary: An outline button with a simple design, used for secondary actions, navigation, or emphasis on a UI. Suitable for applications with a minimal aesthetic. Can be used on desktop or mobile devices to provide an alternative to a standard button.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready button component with the following characteristics:

Name: button-outline
Description: An outline button with a simple design, used for secondary actions, navigation, or emphasis on a UI. Suitable for applications with a minimal aesthetic. Can be used on desktop or mobile devices to provide an alternative to a standard button.
Style: e.g. minimal, simple, flat
Interactions: e.g. focus, hover, clickable
Tags: utility button, secondary action, minimal design

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
